titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell Womens Club of New York records41-6-1674
titlestmt.author: Compiled by E. Engst, M. Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-01-18 18:25:56 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell Womens Club of New York records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell Women\'s Club of New York

did.physdesc: Correspondence, publicity notices, newsletters, brochures, a handbook, minutes, programs, and other materials.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence; materials related to the Federation of Cornell Women's Clubs; material on parties given for new graduates; publicity notices for social events; newsletters; brochures and other material related to art tours; officers handbook; minutes of meetings; history of the club; and programs of the Cornell Women's Club of New York.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell Women's Club of New York Records, #41-6-1674. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence; materials related to the Federation of Cornell Women's Clubs; material on parties given for new graduates; publicity notices for social events; newsletters; brochures and other material related to art tours; officers handbook; minutes of meetings; history of the club; and programs of the Cornell Women's Club of New York.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, Cornell Women's Club announcement, 1910 and printed letter "To Cornell Alumnae."

did.unittitle: Report of the committee appointed by the Cornell Alumni of New York to investigate conditions at Sage College
Leases with Hotel Barbizon, Inc., correspondence
Night of Chance and card party
History of the Cornell Women's Club of NY
Cornell Women's Club -- Women's City Club
Board of Directors meeting minutes and financial records
Board of Directors meeting minutes, etc
Cornell Women's Club announcement and printed letter "To Cornell Alumnae"

unittitle.title: Woman at Work: A Tour Among Careers

did.unittitle: So Brief a Span: poems by Lewette Pollock Pierce (' 14)
